docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TRAMMELL, DOMINIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT PEROFETA, GUILLERMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEROFETA, GUILLERMO
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-21-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO BRING EVIDENCE FROM DMV THAT SHE IS THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAMMELL, DOMINIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEROFETA, GUILLERMO $1,323.63 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,345.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
